name: Chocolate Waffles with Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup vegetable oil or melted butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and sugar.
Make a well in the center of the sifted dry ingredients.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the buttermilk, oil, egg yolks, and vanilla extract.
Pour this mixture into the well and stir with the dry ingredients.
3. Beat the egg whites with cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
Gradually fold the beaten egg whites into the batter, one third at a time.
Fold in the chopped pecans if using.
4. Cook the waffles in the iron according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Top with ice cream.
Makes 4 large waffles.
Notes: These chocolaty waffles are wonderful for serving over ice cream and sauces.
